summary: A Fox News broadcast segment showing on-screen statistics graphics (UC San Diego algebra failure rates, remedial-math bar chart) over a chalkboard/classroom backdrop while an anchor reads the numbers. Standard cable-news data segment with a live clock burned into the corner, not a produced youth-appeal spectacle.
notable_text: FAILED ALGEBRA I; 18% 2025 / 6% 2020; UC SAN DIEGO FRESHMAN PLACED IN REMEDIAL MATH; FOX NEWS
